text: Payroll test failed: assertEqual on gross pay mismatched, expected 1281.25 but got 1281.22, off by a few cents.
Integration test failed: after an admin updated a product's price, checkout still displayed the old value, read 19.99 where 24.99 was expected.
Security test on the product search endpoint failed: a crafted query string returned every row in the table instead of a filtered subset.
Concurrency test for stock-reserve plus shipment-create timed out after 30s under load; worker threads appear stuck.
Load test failed: configured limit is 100, but 137 requests were admitted during a burst.
Perf test on the monthly-statement generator exceeded budget: 413 queries observed for 412 invoices.
Audit-log search by actor hit the 5s statement timeout once the table grew large.
Correlation test failed across the November DST change: events around 01:00-02:00 came out sorted in the wrong order.
Debug instrumentation observed active in production even though the DEBUG setting reads "0".
Export job crashed for some users: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'zip' at exporter.py:74.
Request handler intermittently times out (>30s) on certain user-supplied search strings, with one CPU core pinned at 100% throughout the hang.
Endpoint returned a coroutine object instead of the value; the test saw "<coroutine object ...>" where it expected a dict.
Security test failed: a state-changing POST sent from a forged cross-site origin was accepted; expected a 403.
Service memory grew unbounded under sustained traffic and the process was OOM-killed after a few hours.
Contract test failed: deleting a non-existent resource returned 200 instead of the expected 404.
